title: Large Pull Bow Satin Ribbon, 30pcs Red Pull Bows for Gift Wrapping Christmas Pull Bows Red Gift Wrap Bows for Wedding Cars Party Decorations
features: Pull Bow Satin Ribbon : You will receive 30pcs large pull bow satin ribbon, sufficient to meet your party needs.

High Quality Material: The large pull bows is made of high-quality materials, which are soft and tough, not easy to tear, and present a full and shiny smooth texture on the surface, with a smooth touch, making your gift packaging more exquisite.

Easy to use: Just gently pull open the bow, pull along the ribbon and you get a beautiful bow ribbon. After the pull bows is unfolded, the size is moderate, both eye-catching and not too exaggerated, suitable for Christmas decoration.
Gift Decoration: Christmas gifts are decorated with delicate pull bows ribbons to make your gift stand out.

Suitable for Various Occasions: Exquisite pull bows are perfect for Christmas gift packaging, and can also be used for wedding car decoration, decorating stair handrails or fireplaces, adding a strong Christmas atmosphere.
description: As the holiday approaches, the art of giving gifts becomes an expression of love and affection.
